name: agentsys
description: 20 specialized plugins for AI workflow automation - task orchestration, PR workflow, slop detection, code review, drift detection, enhancement analysis, documentation sync, unified static analysis, perf investigations, topic research, agent config linting, cross-tool AI consultation, structured AI debate, workflow pattern learning, codebase onboarding, contributor guidance, and Zig language support

plugins.name: next-task
plugins.description: Master workflow orchestrator: autonomous workflow with model optimization (opus/sonnet/haiku), two-file state management, workflow enforcement gates, 8 specialist agents

plugins.name: prepare-delivery
plugins.description: Pre-ship quality gates: deslop, simplify, agnix, enhance, review loop, delivery validation, docs sync

plugins.name: gate-and-ship
plugins.description: Quality gates then ship - chains /prepare-delivery then /ship in one command

plugins.name: ship
plugins.description: Complete PR workflow: commit to production, skips review when called from next-task, removes task from registry on cleanup, automatic rollback

plugins.name: deslop
plugins.description: 3-phase AI slop detection: regex patterns (HIGH), multi-pass analyzers (MEDIUM), CLI tools (LOW)

plugins.name: audit-project
plugins.description: Multi-agent iterative code review until zero issues remain

plugins.name: drift-detect
plugins.description: Deep repository analysis to realign project plans with code reality - detects drift, gaps, and creates prioritized reconstruction plans

plugins.name: enhance
plugins.description: Master enhancement orchestrator: parallel analyzer execution for plugins, agents, docs, CLAUDE.md, and prompts with unified reporting

plugins.name: sync-docs
plugins.description: Standalone documentation sync: find outdated refs, update CHANGELOG, flag stale examples based on code changes

plugins.name: repo-intel
plugins.description: Unified static analysis via agent-analyzer - git history, AST symbols, project metadata, and doc-code sync

plugins.name: perf
plugins.description: Rigorous performance investigation workflow with baselines, profiling, hypotheses, and evidence-backed decisions

plugins.name: learn
plugins.description: Research topics online and create comprehensive learning guides with RAG-optimized indexes

plugins.name: agnix
plugins.description: Lint agent configuration files (SKILL.md, CLAUDE.md, hooks, MCP) against 414 rules across 10+ AI tools

plugins.name: consult
plugins.description: Cross-tool AI consultation: get second opinions from Gemini CLI, Codex CLI, Claude Code, OpenCode, or Copilot CLI with model and thinking effort control

plugins.name: debate
plugins.description: Structured multi-round debate between AI tools with proposer/challenger roles and verdict

plugins.name: web-ctl
plugins.description: Browser automation and web testing toolkit for AI agents - headless browser control, persistent sessions, auth handoff, and prompt injection defense

plugins.name: skillers
plugins.description: Learn from workflow patterns across sessions and suggest skills, hooks, and agents to automate repetitive work

plugins.name: onboard
plugins.description: Codebase onboarding - automated data collection and interactive project orientation

plugins.name: can-i-help
plugins.description: Find where to contribute to any project - matches developer skills to test gaps, stale docs, bugspots, and open issues

plugins.name: zig-lsp
plugins.description: Zig language server for Claude Code via ZLS - automatic diagnostics after every edit, jump-to-definition, find-references, and hover. Requires zls in PATH
